name: bonding
description: BONDING — real-world social game. Humans are atoms, relationships are chemical bonds.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @bonding/shared-types build && pnpm build:onboarding && pnpm --filter @bonding/server build && pnpm --filter @bonding/mobile build
scripts.deploy:onboarding: pnpm build:onboarding && wrangler pages deploy apps/onboarding/dist --project-name bonding-meatspace --branch master
scripts.deploy:server: git push origin master  # triggers auto-deploy on Render/Railway
scripts.deploy:all: pnpm deploy:onboarding && echo '✓ Meatspace onboarding deployed to bonding-meatspace.pages.dev'
scripts.setup: pnpm install && docker compose up -d && pnpm --filter @bonding/server db:migrate && pnpm --filter @bonding/server db:seed
